name: hostinger-api-mcp
description: Manage your Hostinger account from Gemini CLI — domains, DNS, hosting, VPS, billing, e-commerce and more via the Hostinger API.

settings.name: Hostinger API Token
settings.description: Hostinger API token from hpanel.hostinger.com/profile/api. Optional — if left unset, the server falls back to interactive OAuth sign-in in stdio mode.
